title: tontelea cylindrocarpa
intro: Tontelea cylindrocarpa, also known as "Cordia" or "Tontelea," is a plant species in the Bignoniaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Its leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations to provide relief from coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues, and also to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Tontelea cylindrocarpa is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that promote overall health and well-being.
